parameters.query:
SELECT
  ts.id AS subscription_id,
  ts.organization_id,
  ts.plan_id,
  ts.current_period_start,
  ts.current_period_end,
  bp.name AS plan_name,
  bp.price_zar AS base_price_cents,
  o.name AS org_name
FROM tenant_subscriptions ts
JOIN billing_plans bp ON bp.id = ts.plan_id
JOIN organizations o ON o.id = ts.organization_id
WHERE ts.status IN ('active', 'trialing')
  AND ts.current_period_end <= CURRENT_DATE;

SELECT
  ue.dimension,
  COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS used,
  COALESCE(pl.included_quantity, 0) AS included,
  GREATEST(0, COUNT(*)::INTEGER - COALESCE(pl.included_quantity, 0)) AS overage_units,
  COALESCE(pl.overage_rate_zar, 0) AS overage_rate,
  GREATEST(0, COUNT(*)::INTEGER - COALESCE(pl.included_quantity, 0)) * COALESCE(pl.overage_rate_zar, 0) AS overage_cost_cents
FROM usage_events ue
JOIN plan_limits pl ON pl.plan_id = '{{ $json.plan_id }}' AND pl.dimension = ue.dimension
WHERE ue.organization_id = '{{ $json.organization_id }}'
  AND ue.created_at >= '{{ $json.current_period_start }}'
  AND ue.created_at < '{{ $json.current_period_end }}'
GROUP BY ue.dimension, pl.included_quantity, pl.overage_rate_zar;

-- Log invoice to subscription_history
INSERT INTO subscription_history (
  organization_id, transaction_id, amount, status, payment_method, notes, created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.organization_id }}',
  'inv-{{ $json.organization_id }}-' || TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'),
  {{ $json.total_cents }}::NUMERIC / 100,
  'pending',
  'payfast',
  'Monthly invoice: {{ $json.plan_name }} ({{ $json.base_display }}) + Overage ({{ $json.overage_display }}) = {{ $json.total_display }}',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id;

-- Reset billing period
-- UPDATE tenant_subscriptions
-- SET current_period_start = current_period_end,
--     current_period_end = (current_period_end + INTERVAL '1 month')::DATE,
--     updated_at = NOW()
-- WHERE id = '{{ $json.subscription_id }}';
